datapoints.description: Total number of managed clusters registered with the hub
datapoints.name: clusters_total

datapoints.description: Number of managed clusters with Available condition true
datapoints.name: clusters_available

datapoints.description: Number of managed clusters with Available condition not true
datapoints.name: clusters_unavailable

datapoints.description: Number of managed clusters with Joined condition true
datapoints.name: clusters_joined

datapoints.description: Total worker CPU cores across all managed clusters
datapoints.name: total_worker_cores

datapoints.description: ACM hub controller reconcile error rate per second over 5 minutes
datapoints.name: hub_reconcile_errors

datapoints.description: Total ACM hub controller work queue depth
datapoints.name: hub_workqueue_depth

description: Fleet-level ACM hub health including managed cluster counts, availability, worker capacity, and hub controller health via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Fleet-level ACM metrics from acm_managed_cluster_info (cluster counts, capacity) and acm_managed_cluster_status_condition (availability/joined status). Controller-runtime metrics for hub operator health. The total_worker_cores metric extracts the core_worker label from acm_managed_cluster_info.
name: ACM_Hub_Overview
